action_set_definitions.name: get_current_session_state
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the active curation list and session context for a specific user.

user_id.description: The unique identifier for the user (e.g., 'Elias').

action_set_definitions.name: get_pedagogical_thresholds
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves technical reference data for pedagogical rules, including 'Leech' failure thresholds and remedial lesson mappings.

action_set_definitions.name: get_content_metadata
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves detailed metadata for a specific set of content IDs, including category, mastery level, and user-specific performance (failure counts).

content_ids.description: List of content IDs to query.

user_id.description: The user ID to fetch personalized mastery data for.

action_set_definitions.name: search_inventory
action_set_definitions.description: Searches the content inventory for items matching specific pedagogical and categorical criteria.

mastery_level.description: The required mastery level (0 for New, 1+ for Review).

action_set_definitions.name: calculate_curation_metrics
action_set_definitions.description: Calculates diversity scores and validates cognitive load budget for a proposed list of items.

content_ids.description: The list of 5 item IDs to evaluate.

action_set_definitions.name: update_active_curation
action_set_definitions.description: Submits and saves the finalized curation list for the user.

final_list.description: Ordered list of exactly 5 content IDs.

state_description.active_curation_list: An ordered list of content IDs currently selected for the recommendation feed.
state_description.target_audience: The demographic or user segment currently being targeted (e.g., 'tech_enthusiasts', 'general_news_readers').
state_description.platform_trends: A list of topics or tags currently trending on the platform that influence engagement.
state_description.content_inventory: A collection of available content items indexed by ID, including their metadata (category, quality score, etc.).
state_description.session_metrics: Accumulated engagement data for the current curation session (e.g., total predicted CTR).
